cost_analysis.note: Backtest plays each suggestion against every historical draw.

prev_suggestions_performance.note: No draws occurred after suggestions were generated.

analysis.llm_summary: Selected top candidates prioritize highest scores from the shortlist, aligning with frequent digits in key positions (e.g., 4 and 3 in position 1, 6 and 3 in position 2) and avoiding duplicates. The top5 are the strongest scoring numbers, all within the top50, ensuring consistency with historical digit frequency patterns.
